title: Eggs N Eyes
description: Add eyes to most of the new spawn eggs.
body:
Add eyes to most of the new spawn eggs. So those are even more cursed! :p

Emissive only works on 1.21.5 

(Require at least 1.21.5!)

![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/757ccd7dbce5b352988512e78339c2bbb77987db.png)
![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36cae4971fb210fe6fddee9f3f0c251519d052ff.png)
